sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - NICOLE (-after 20 Dec 1225).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - NICOLE Dame de Montrivel et de Châteauvillain du Jura, daughter of [--- & his wife --- de Salins] (-after 20 Dec 1225).

zh.Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, F: 法國福朗-可特艾尤拉薩林勒-白斯
zh.of,Broyes,Marne,France: 法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布洛也斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicole de Salins於1160年出生在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉薩林勒-白斯時，她的父親Renaud de Traves35歲，母親Elisabeth de Salins35歲。她於1175年之前與Simon Ier de Commercy在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1233年在法國洛萊姆斯可莫希享年73歲。

zh-hans.Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, F: 法国福朗-可特艾尤拉薩林勒-白斯
zh-hans.of,Broyes,Marne,France: 法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布洛也斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicole de Salins于1160年出生在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉薩林勒-白斯时，她的父亲Renaud de Traves35岁，母亲Elisabeth de Salins35岁。她于1175年之前与Simon Ier de Commercy在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1233年在法国洛萊姆斯可莫希享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Salins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latvian (Saliņš): topographic name for someone living on an island, derived from sala ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Nicholas  , now also in frequent use throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicole de Salins was born in 1160, in Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, her father, Renaud de Traves, was 35 and her mother, Elisabeth de Salins, was 35. She married Simon Ier de Commercy before 1175, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1233, in Commercy, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicole de Salins est née en 1160, à Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, France, son père, Renaud de Traves, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Salins, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Simon Ier de Commercy avant 1175, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1233, à Commercy, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicole de Salins 1160 in Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud de Traves 35 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Salins 35. Sie hat vor 1175 in Europa Simon Ier de Commercy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1233 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Commercy, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicole de Salins è nata il nel 1160 nel Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Renaud de Traves, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Salins, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Simon Ier de Commercy prima del 1175, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1233, nel Commercy, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicole de Salinsが1160年にフランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラサリンス-レス-ベインスで生まれた時，父Renaud de Travesは35歳，母Elisabeth de Salinsは35歳であった。1175年以前にヨーロッパでSimon Ier de Commercyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1233年にフランスロレィヌメウゼコンメルシで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicole de Salins(이)가 1160년 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 살린스-레스-베이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud de Traves(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Salins(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1175년 이전 우럽에서 Simon Ier de Commercy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 코머시에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicole de Salins nasceu em 1160, em Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Renaud de Traves, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Salins, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon Ier de Commercy antes 1175, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1233, em Commercy, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicole de Salins родилась в 1160 г. в местности салинс-лес-беинс, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud de Traves было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Salins, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon Ier de Commercy перед 1175 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1233 г. в местности коммирси, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicole de Salins nació en 1160, en Salins-les-Bains, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Renaud de Traves, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Salins, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Simon Ier de Commercy antes de 1175, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1233, en Commercy, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
